body: Hi Suresh, you mentioned wanting to explore a corporate bulk thali package. I've drafted a few options based on your current weekday thali. Want to see them now?
rationale: This message directly follows up on the merchant's expressed intent to explore corporate bulk thali packages, offering to present drafted options to move the planning forward with a single binary CTA. body: Hi Padma, I saw you wanted to add a kids yoga program. I've drafted a plan for a 4-week summer camp, 3 classes/week, for ages 7-12, priced at ₹2,499. Want me to post this on your GBP and Insta now?

body: Hi Ramesh, summer demand is picking up! ORS, sunscreen, and anti-fungal demand is up by ~40-45%, while cold & cough is down 60%. We can help rearrange your shelves to highlight these high-demand items. Let me know if you want to go ahead.

[validator warnings: merchant language preference includes Hindi but body has no Hindi tokens (use natural hi-en code-mix)]

body: Hi Doc, saw this IDA Delhi webinar on Digital Impressions happening May 2nd. It's worth 2 credits and free for IDA members. Might be useful given the clear aligner trend we're seeing. Want me to share the registration link?
rationale: This message informs Dr. Meera about a relevant continuing education opportunity, linking it to a current market trend and offering a clear next step. [validator warnings: merchant language preference includes Hindi but body has no Hindi tokens (use natural hi-en code-mix)]

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, aapki Metformin, Atorvastatin aur Telmisartan ki refill 28 April tak khatam ho jayegi. Kya aap chahenge ki hum aapke saved address par delivery schedule kar dein? Aapko Senior Citizen discount ke tahat 15% off bhi milega.
rationale: This message reminds Mr. Sharma about his upcoming medication refill, specifies the molecules, provides a clear deadline, and offers a senior citizen discount to encourage a prompt refill order.

body: Hi Vivaan, it's been 3 months since your last visit to Bright Smile Dental on April 1st. Based on the JIDA Oct 2026 study, a 3-month recall is more effective for adults with a history of caries. Would you like to book your next dental cleaning for ₹299?
rationale: This message aims to re-engage a customer who is due for a dental check-up, referencing a specific study to encourage a timely appointment for a cleaning service. [validator warnings: merchant language preference includes Hindi but body has no Hindi tokens (use natural hi-en code-mix)]

body: Hi Dr. Meera, just wanted to share that a new clinic, Smile Studio, opened nearby on April 8th. They're offering Dental Cleaning at ₹199. Given our Dental Cleaning offer is at ₹299, it might be worth highlighting the value we provide, perhaps focusing on our patient reviews or the detailed consultation that comes with it.
rationale: Inform Dr. Meera about a new competitor's opening and their offer, suggesting a way to differentiate based on existing strengths to maintain patient value perception. [validator warnings: merchant language preference includes Hindi but body has no Hindi tokens (use natural hi-en code-mix)]

body: Hi Suresh, just letting you know that a new restaurant, 'Spice Route', has opened up in Indiranagar. They seem to be focusing on North Indian cuisine. Might be worth keeping an eye on footfall trends in the area.
rationale: Inform the merchant about a new competitor opening in their locality to keep them aware of market changes and potential impact on footfall. [validator warnings: merchant language preference includes Hindi but body has no Hindi tokens (use natural hi-en code-mix)]

body: Lakshmi, Kapra mein bridal trial searches 28% badh gaye hain. Aapke reviews mein bhi 12 baar Balayage mention hua hai. Kya hum April-May wedding season ke liye 'Bridal Trial @ ₹999' offer activate karein to capture this demand? Reply YES.
rationale: Uses local search growth (28%) and positive review themes (12 mentions) to suggest activating a seasonal bridal offer for the April-May window.

body: Hi Suresh, aapka ₹149 thali already 18 orders/day touch kar raha hai. Google Trends (Apr 2026) ke according 'weekday lunch thali' searches 34% up hain, toh corporate bulk pack perfect rahega. Maine Indiranagar offices ke liye 'Free Delivery > ₹500' bundle draft kiya hai — bhej doon? Reply YES.
rationale: The merchant previously signaled intent for a corporate thali version; I am routing to action by proposing a specific bundle (Free Delivery > ₹500) anchored on their current performance (18 orders/day) and market demand (34% search growth).

body: Hi Rashmi, it's been 57 days since your last session on Feb 28 at PowerHouse Fitness. Consistency break ho gayi hai, but it's the perfect time to restart your weight loss journey. Humne aapke liye 3 FREE Trial Classes reserve kiye hain to help you get back into your evening routine. Kya hum slot book karein? Reply YES to start.
rationale: Uses the specific 57-day lapse and Feb 28 date anchor to create personal accountability, offering the merchant's 3-class trial to lower the friction for a return.

body: Reyansh, it has been 6 months since your last visit to Asha Dental Care on April 1st. Periodontal health maintain karne ke liye regular scaling zaroori hai to prevent plaque buildup. We have a Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 slot available this week. Kya hum aapka appointment schedule karein? Reply YES to confirm.
rationale: Recall message for a repeat patient (5 visits) who hasn't visited in 6 months, using a specific price-anchored cleaning offer and the last visit date as a hook.

body: Hi Reyansh, Daily Care Medicos se message hai. Aapki last visit 1st April ko thi, aur ab refill ka time ho gaya hai. Aapki convenience ke liye, ₹499 se upar ke orders par hum Free Home Delivery provide kar rahe hain. Kya main aapki medicines pack karwa doon? Reply YES.
rationale: Re-engaging a loyal customer (12 visits) by referencing their last visit date and offering free delivery for their refill to drive a conversion.

body: Anjali, Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon ke calls pichle 30 days mein 30% drop huye hain. Magicpin internal data (Apr 2026) ke mutabiq, GBP par 'Walk-in available' tag lagane se calls 23% tak badh sakte hain. Kya main ye update kar doon? Reply YES.
rationale: Re-engaging a dormant merchant by highlighting a specific performance dip and offering a low-friction, data-backed solution to recover call volume.

body: Hi Anand, magicpin data (Apr 2026) shows weeknight IPL matches drive 18% more covers, but Chai Point Cafe calls are down 21% this week. Sector 8 mein log match-night offers dhoond rahe hain. I've drafted a 'Match-night Combo @ ₹399' to help recover the footfall. Haan bolein to live kar dein?
rationale: Re-engaging a dormant merchant by highlighting a 21% drop in calls and offering a data-backed IPL combo to recover footfall.

body: Hi Lakshmi, Diwali Oct 31 ko hai, but April-May ka mini-bridal window abhi start ho raha hai. Wedding industry intel (Apr 2026) ke according, salons often miss this 15% annual volume. Maine Studio11 Family Salon ke liye 'Bridal Trial @ ₹999' ka draft ready kiya hai to capture this demand. Post kar doon? Reply YES.
rationale: This message uses the upcoming Diwali trigger to pivot to the immediate April-May bridal opportunity cited in the industry digest, offering a specific price-anchored service to drive bookings.

body: Pooja, Ugadi is on April 18. April-June acquisition window kaafi low rehta hai, so let's focus on PT demand which is up 38% YoY among the 30-50 age group. I've drafted a 'Personal Training Demo @ ₹199' offer for Bend & Burn to keep the footfall steady. Haan bolein to start?
rationale: Uses the upcoming Ugadi festival and seasonal data to suggest a PT-focused offer during a low-acquisition period to maintain footfall.

body: Hi Vikas, Sunrise Medicos abhi tak Google par unverified show ho raha hai. Is wajah se aap lagbhag 30% potential views aur calls miss kar rahe hain Gomti Nagar mein. Kya main verification process (phone ya postcard) start karne mein help karun? Reply YES.
rationale: The merchant's Google profile is unverified; citing the 30% uplift stat from the trigger payload provides a clear incentive to act.

body: Hi Suresh, aaj Delhi mein DC vs MI match hai 7:30 PM pe. Magicpin data (Apr 2026) ke hisaab se weekend matches pe dine-in covers 12% kam ho jate hain kyunki log ghar pe match dekhte hain. Delivery orders badhane ke liye, shall we push a 'Match-night Combo @ ₹399' for SK Pizza Junction? Maine draft ready rakha hai, bas YES bolein to start karein.
rationale: Uses the local IPL match and specific magicpin data about weekend match trends to suggest a delivery-focused combo to offset the expected dine-in dip.

body: Mylari South Indian Cafe 145 reviews par hai, just 5 away from the 150 milestone. Aapka review count already Indiranagar peer average (142) se upar nikal gaya hai. 150th review cross hote hi hum ise feature kar sakte hain. Any standout customer story or regular guest jise aap highlight karna chahenge?
rationale: Celebrate the imminent 150-review milestone while highlighting that they've already surpassed the peer average of 142 to build social proof and encourage engagement.

body: Hi Mukesh, aapke views 787 touch kar gaye hain (+14% vs last 7d) aur iss saal aapne total 889 unique customers serve kiye hain. Aundh mein itne logon ka trust jeetna badi baat hai! Isme se koi aisi standout customer story hai jo aap feature karna chahenge?
rationale: Celebrating the 889 unique customer milestone while surfacing the 14% view growth to encourage social proof content.

body: Dr. Bharat, Bharat Dental Care ke patient calls 50% drop hue hain last 7 days mein (4 vs baseline 12). Views bhi 22% down hain aur aapka CTR 0.018 hai, jabki Mumbai peer average 0.03 rehta hai. Patient flow wapas lane ke liye, shall I activate a 'Dental Cleaning @ ₹299' offer on your profile? Isse visibility improve hogi. Reply YES to go live.
rationale: The merchant is seeing a severe 50% drop in calls and is performing below the peer CTR average; proposing a specific low-cost cleaning offer aims to recover visibility and patient volume.

body: Sushma, The Beauty Bar ke calls currently 22 par hain, which is 21% below the Pune peer average of 28 calls. Views 8% up hone ke bawajood, calls convert nahi ho rahe. To fix this, shall I activate a 'Hair Spa @ ₹499' offer to drive more bookings? Reply YES to start.
rationale: The merchant's call volume (22) is below the peer average (28) despite a slight increase in views, so I am proposing a specific catalog offer to boost conversion.

body: Calls 18, +15% vs last 7d. Zen Yoga Studio team, aapka kids yoga interest is clearly picking up. Momentum capture karne ke liye, should I draft a Google update featuring '3 FREE Trial Classes' to convert these inquiries into walk-ins? Bolo haan to proceed.
rationale: Surface the 15% call spike and leverage the kids yoga momentum by proposing a trial class offer to drive conversions.

body: Calls 14, +5% vs last 7d. Hi Vikas, Sunrise Medicos ki profile par traffic badh raha hai. Halaanki aapke views (720) abhi neighbourhood average (1400) se kam hain, summer demand ki wajah se ORS aur sunscreen ki search 40% up hai (Source: Multi-pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026). Kya hum 'Free Home Delivery > ₹499' activate karein taaki ye traffic orders mein convert ho jaye? Reply YES.
rationale: Surface call spike, mention peer gap in views, and propose a delivery offer to capture seasonal summer demand.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic se. Aapka 6-month cleaning recall due hai (last visit 2026-05-12). 2 evening slots ready hain — Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, ya apna preferred time bata dein.
rationale: Customer-facing 6-month cleaning recall with the two specific evening slots from the trigger payload, the merchant's real active offer (Dental Cleaning @ ₹299), Priya's hi-en mix language preference, and a numeric-reply CTA appropriate for a booking flow.

body: Hi Diya, Zen Yoga Studio here. It's been a month since your last class on 2026-04-01 — your spot's still warm. Restart with First Month @ ₹499 and a complimentary Body Composition Analysis to see where you're at after the break. Reply YES to lock a class this week.
rationale: Customer-facing win-back for Diya (lapsed_soft, 9 prior visits, English-pref). Anchors on the exact last_visit date, the merchant's two real active offers (First Month @ ₹499 + Free Body Composition Analysis), single binary CTA.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI ka naya circular hai (Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04) — IOPA radiograph dose limit revise ho gayi hai effective 2026-12-15. D-speed film naye limit pe pass nahi hota; E-speed aur Digital RVG sensors fine hain. Aapko X-ray setup ka SOP audit chahiye is deadline se pehle. Main aapke liye 1-page audit checklist draft kar deti hoon — reply YES toh bhej deti hoon.
rationale: Regulation-change/research-digest framing: cites the DCI circular by name and date, the new compliance deadline from the trigger payload, the actionable distinction (D-speed/E-speed/RVG) from the digest item, and offers effort externalization (drafted checklist) with a single binary CTA.
